name: Bazzite
tagline: The immutable gaming OS — Steam Deck experience on any PC
description: Bazzite is a Fedora-based immutable desktop OS from the Universal Blue project, purpose-built for gaming. It ships with the latest Mesa drivers, Wayland-native gaming stack, HDR support, GameMode, MangoHud, and a pre-configured Proton/Wine environment — all baked into an atomic, read-only base image that updates like a container and can be rolled back instantly if anything breaks. A separate Deck edition mirrors the Steam Deck UI for living-room HTPCs. Bazzite has become one of the fastest-growing Linux distributions in 2024–2025, praised for delivering a console-like gaming experience with zero driver wrangling.
